Feature: DEEP AUDIT: Astro Docs Site — Enterprise Documentation Quality Review

## Deep Audit V2: Astro Starlight Documentation Site

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the documentation site at `apps/docs/`.

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Content Accuracy** — All component docs match current CEM. No stale API references. All 78+ components documented.
2. **Navigation** — Sidebar structure logical. Categories match component taxonomy. Search works.
3. **Code Examples** — All example
